content.en:
Ye Tian began to use the Demon Ancient Mirror to comprehend and analyze the ultimate ancient aura, even if it was extremely harmful to the copying body, he didn't care.

After some time, a replica body was scrapped.

He continued to copy the second replica body, and continued to comprehend the Ultimate Ancient Sense, and his own comprehension of the Ultimate Rule Realm deepened.

Before you know it, a relatively long period of time has passed.

At this time.

The aura of the Ultimate Ancient Sect completely dissipated, but Ye Tian still relied on the Demon Ancient Mirror to comprehend, striving to comprehend the power of the Ultimate Rule Realm as soon as possible, even if it was only a little rudimentary, it would be very good!

Time flies, and long years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than in the past, and he felt that he was not far from comprehending the rudiments of the ultimate rules.

Moreover, "Two, Four, Seven", his ultimate rule of ten thousand laws has already regained the three-hundred-sixty-five level of perfection, and his physical body has also reached the high realm of the king level.

this day.

With Ye Tian's comprehension of the Ultimate Rule Realm, as well as the Ultimate Ancient Sense's aura, coupled with the assistance of the Magic Ancient Mirror, he successfully created a top-notch Ultimate Arcane, and it was also a top-notch Ultimate Arcane in terms of defense.

He named this top-notch ultimate arcane art, the Armor of Arromu!

With the Armor of Arromu, the top ultimate arcane art, his life-preserving ability has greatly increased, and now there are only a handful of emperors who can be killed.

Of course, two top-notch ultimate arcanes weren't enough, but it was pretty unbelievable for him to create two top-notch ultimate arcanes at the moment.

His realm was relatively low, his thinking was a little poorer, coupled with the fact that his cultivation time was short, and he had less knowledge of the ancient demon level, he naturally couldn't quickly create a large number of top-notch ultimate arcane arts.

But after his cultivation is improved, it will definitely not be difficult to master some more knowledge and create a top-notch ultimate arcane!

......

Time flies.

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's cultivation progress was extremely slow.

In this era, the improvement of cultivation is very dependent on resources, but this is also a good thing, at least each realm is more stable, and the combat power of the same level is more powerful, any ancient demon-level existence can beat the general ultimate supreme of his era, and it is also a crushing hanging.

"I have to get some resources, I can't get any resources from Haru, and if I ask for some ordinary resources, Haru will definitely be suspicious. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he can only rely on himself to obtain resources.

this day.

Ye Tian came to find He Lao, and now, with his strength and status, he can come directly to He Lao, and there is no need to report to the patriarch Heying.

Besides, with Crane Shadow's strength and realm, he can't help him.

"Elder Tian, you're here!"

He Lao said.

Ye Tian was straight to the point, and asked directly: "Elder He, my cultivation has been making slow progress recently, and now I am seriously lacking in resources, and the resources in the clan are not of much help to me, I want to obtain some precious resources, do you know where there is a treasure land of this kind of resources? I want to go out and break through!"

"Lack of resources?"

He Lao pondered for a while.

He also lacks resources, and at his level, the demand for resources is greater, and although Ye Tian is a king, his physical body is no worse than him, and he naturally has a greater need for resources.

"Elder Tian, if you want to obtain resources, you may be able to go to the Dragon Swallow Pond to give it a try, it is a strange place, and there is a high suppression of the cultivation above the emperor level, with your strength, you may be able to obtain some good things by entering the Dragon Swallow Pool. However, the treasure land of Longtuntan was occupied by a tribe. "

He Lao Road.

"What tribe?" Ye Tian hurriedly asked.

He Lao said: "Dragon Disciple Tribe!"

"The Dragon Disciple Tribe is much stronger than our Eagle Tribe, they have more than thirty emperor-level existences, but so far they have not given birth to an ancient demon-level. Of course, this is only on the surface, maybe the ancient demon level is hidden, then it is not certain. After all, many of the top emperor-level of the Dragon Disciple Tribe disappeared or fell for no reason, maybe they really fell, maybe they went into hiding and went to other territories, so as to break through and impact the ancient demon level!"

Ye Tian listened to He Lao talk about the information of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and also had an understanding of the strength of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

In any case, there is definitely no ancient demon-level existence in the headquarters of the Dragon Disciple Tribe, and there must be no ancient demon-level existence on the side of Dragon Swallowing Pond, otherwise the Golden God Department is afraid that it will target the Dragon Disciple Tribe0.

Therefore, he was not worried that he would encounter an ancient demon-level existence.

At this time, He Lao said again: "If you want to enter the Dragon Swallow Pond, you must sneak in, there have been emperor-level sneaks into the Dragon Swallow Pond in the past, even if you are discovered, escape in time, the Dragon Disciple Tribe will not be crazy to chase and kill." "

"I see!"

Ye Tianying said.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately let a replica body go to the side of the Dragon Swallow Pond.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the side of Longtuntan, which was about seventy or eighty tribes from the Eagle Department, which was also very far away.

Along the way, Ye Tian also sensed the clansmen of the Dragon Disciple Tribe.

However, he did not directly enter the Dragon Swallow Pond, he was going to copy the body of a Dragon Swallow Pond king, so that after entering the Dragon Swallow Pond, it would not be easy to be exposed.

And soon, he had a goal, directly copied the body of this Dragon Swallowing Pond king, and then escaped into the Dragon Swallowing Pool.

From the outside world, the Dragon Swallowing Pond is a huge pool lake that devours countless ultimate particles, but from the outside world, it is impossible to perceive the internal situation.

Wow!

After Ye Tian escaped into the Dragon Swallowing Pond, he also felt the suppression of this piece of heaven and earth.

However, the concentration of ultimate particles here is very high, and if you cultivate here, your cultivation efficiency will definitely surpass that of the outside world.

It's just that any king-level or emperor-level is not willing to stay here for a long time, because there is a force here that suppresses the ultimate will, and even greatly reduces the speed of thinking.

If you cultivate here, you won't be able to comprehend the ultimate rules, create the ultimate arcane, or even improve the ultimate will.

In other words, this place is actually not suitable for cultivation, it is only suitable for improving physical strength.

No king-level or emperor-level is willing to stay here and cultivate all the time.
